chapters.title: The Dasha order in this case study
chapters.content_preview: The Dasha order in this case study:  - In the birth chart, the Ascendant is an odd sign and the dasha will follow the direct zodiacal order.  - The dasha starts from Dwiswabavi (Common) signs, it first covers the four common signs. chapters.title: JAIMINI ASTROLOGY
chapters.content_preview: JAIMINI ASTROLOGY -  CALCULATION OF MANDOOK DASHA WITH A CASE STUDY  The dasha periods for each sign:  Sagittarius = 12 years ( as the lord Jupiter 15 swagrahi)

chapters.title: CALCULATION OF MANDOOK DASHA WITH A CASE STUDY
chapters.content_preview: CALCULATION OF MANDOOK DASHA WITH A CASE STUDY  The dasha periods for each sign:  Sagittarius = 12 years ( as the lord Jupiter 15 swagrahi)  Pisces = 10 years (count reverse from Pisces to Jupiter) Gemini = 4 years (Count directly to Mercury from Gemini)

chapters.title: The dasha periods for each sign
chapters.content_preview: The dasha periods for each sign:  Sagittarius = 12 years ( as the lord Jupiter 15 swagrahi)  Pisces = 10 years (count reverse from Pisces to Jupiter) Gemini = 4 years (Count directly to Mercury from Gemini) Virgo = 12 years (Mercury it’s lord is swagrahi)
